_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Establish, resource, implement, and assess cyber workforce management programs in accordance with organizational requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Design, develop, and deliver data and AI training programs for defined organizational audiences, including needs assessment, curriculum development, delivery execution, and effectiveness measurement.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-003 (TF, cosine: 0.460), AI-T-018 (AI, cosine: 0.435).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.494). Shared vocabulary: [organizational, programs]. DCWF-only terms [accordance, assess, cyber, establish, implement, management] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assessment, audiences, curriculum, data, defined] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.886 (P=0.894, R=0.877). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:25.4%, N:73.5%, C:1.2%). No dominant classification for "Establish, resource, implement, and assess cyber workforce management programs i" vs "Design, develop, and deliver data and AI training programs for defined organizat" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.496 ≈ STS 0.494 (gap 0.003). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [organizational, programs] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.4%. Shared tokens: [organizational, programs]. DCWF-only: [accordance, assess, cyber, establish, implement, management]. WIDAI-only: [ai, assessment, audiences, curriculum, data, defined].
